prompt: A professional infographic poster titled "Top 25 Most Influential People" with a dark navy blue background and gold decorative accents. The layout features a 5-column grid of 25 individual portrait cards arranged in 5 rows. Each card has a cream/beige background with a faint world map watermark behind the portrait. Each card contains: a gold rank number in the top-left corner, a realistic illustrated portrait in the center, the person's full name in bold gold serif font at the bottom, their field of influence in smaller white text below, and a recognizable organization or company logo at the very bottom. The title at the top reads "TOP 25 MOST INFLUENTIAL PEOPLE" in large gold serif font with a gold laurel emblem above it. Luxury editorial design, premium typography, dark navy and gold color palette, highly detailed. 1744x2336
